name: Observation chamber
hints: An observation chamber with a one-way mirror, a valve handle, and a locked door.
GET HAND to take the valve handle. It fits the valve in the pit (room 16).
The one-way mirror lets you observe without being seen. The locked door needs a key.
The valve handle is critical - bring it to the pit (room 16) to drain the water tank. E=mirror room (room 2).
notes: Observation chamber with the valve handle (needed in pit room 16 to drain the tank). One-way mirror and locked door also here. E=mirror room (room 2).
